# CBPeripheralManagerOptionShowPowerAlertKey

**Global Variable**

A Boolean value specifying whether the system should warn if Bluetooth is in the powered-off state when instantiating the peripheral manager.

## Declaration

```swift
let CBPeripheralManagerOptionShowPowerAlertKey: String
```

## Discussion

The value for this key is an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSNumber]. If the key isn’t specified, the default value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Initialization Options

- **CBPeripheralManagerOptionRestoreIdentifierKey**: A unique identifier (UID) with which to instantiate the peripheral manager.
